DocumentationFact.Name: Description
DocumentationFact.Value: Save only objects that bind and validate successfully.

DocumentationFact.Name: Description
DocumentationFact.Value: Optional sanctioned conversion policy workspace. Omitted uses built-in defaults.

DocumentationFact.Name: Description
DocumentationFact.Value: Execution context for one/two-part source identifiers.

DocumentationFact.Name: Description
DocumentationFact.Value: Required when any one-part source identifier exists.

DocumentationFact.Name: Description
DocumentationFact.Value: Comma-separated target columns to exclude from target conformance checks.

DocumentationFact.Name: Description
DocumentationFact.Value: Comma-separated target columns to exclude only on target tables where they exist.

DocumentationFact.Name: Description
DocumentationFact.Value: Directory where the binding workspace will be created.

DocumentationFact.Name: Description
DocumentationFact.Value: TSV report for objects skipped due to binding or validation failure. Requires --allow-partial.
